title: Chamath Palihapitiya
html:
Chamath Palihapitiya — investor / former Facebook exec. Cited in Yahir's March 2023 generation thinking framework as one of the social-media-era figures (alongside Zuckerberg + Dorsey). Yahir also references Chamath's validation-from-within insight.

What we know

  • Generation framing (Yahir's March 2023 note): Chamath listed under Social Media (00s-10s) era, alongside Mark Zuckerberg and Jack Dorsey.
  • Validation insight: Yahir references Chamath (combined with Mari from cross-country) as the source for the "validation comes from within" lesson.
  • Position: another mentor-from-afar — Yahir tracks his interviews and frames.

Related summaries

  • 2023 03 24 thoughts on ai emergence
  • validation from within
